message: Keep proxygen scope and drop build-jobs tweaks

files.patch:
@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@08c6903cd8c0fde910a37f88322edcfb5dd907a8  # v5.0.0
       - name: Checkout submodules
         run: |
-          git submodule update --init --recursive libtenzir
+          git submodule update --init --recursive libtenzir/aux/proxygen
       - name: Tailscale
         if: false
         uses: tailscale/github-action@a392da0a182bba0e9613b6243ebd69529b1878aa  # v4.1.0

@@ -853,7 +853,8 @@ if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
     set(_tenzir_folly_version "")
   endif ()
   if (_tenzir_folly_version)
-    string(REGEX REPLACE "-.*$" "" _tenzir_folly_version "${_tenzir_folly_version}")
+    string(REGEX REPLACE "-.*$" "" _tenzir_folly_version
+                         "${_tenzir_folly_version}")
     if (_tenzir_folly_version VERSION_LESS "${TENZIR_FOLLY_MINIMUM_VERSION}")
       message(
         FATAL_ERROR
@@ -863,7 +864,8 @@ if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
   else ()
     message(
       WARNING
-      "Found Folly without a version string; skipping minimum version verification.")
+        "Found Folly without a version string; skipping minimum version verification."
+    )
   endif ()
   find_package(glog REQUIRED)
   dependency_summary("folly" Folly::folly "Dependencies")
@@ -970,7 +972,8 @@ endif ()
 
 # -- proxygen ------------------------------------------------------------------
 
-option(TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN "Build the Proxygen submodule and integrate it" OFF)
+option(TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN "Build the Proxygen submodule and integrate it"
+       OFF)
 if (TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN)
   if (NOT EXISTS
       "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/proxygen/CMakeLists.txt")
@@ -981,39 +984,50 @@ if (TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN)
   endif ()
   # Keep Proxygen from pulling bundled dependencies so it can stay versioned and
   # dependency-matched with the separate Folly submodule.
-  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_FOLLY OFF CACHE BOOL "")
-  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_WANGLE OFF CACHE BOOL "")
-  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_FIZZ OFF CACHE BOOL "")
-  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_MVFST OFF CACHE BOOL "")
-  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_ZLIB OFF CACHE BOOL "")
-  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_ZSTD OFF CACHE BOOL "")
-  set(BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_FOLLY
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_WANGLE
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_FIZZ
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_MVFST
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_ZLIB
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_ZSTD
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(BUILD_TESTS
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
   set(_TENZIR_CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES "${CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES}")
   set(CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES ON)
   add_subdirectory(libtenzir/aux/proxygen SYSTEM)
   set(CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES "${_TENZIR_CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES}")
   set(_tenzir_proxygen_target "")
-  foreach (_tenzir_candidate IN ITEMS
-                                  "proxygen"
-                                  "Proxygen::proxygen"
-                                  "proxygenhttpserver"
-                                  "Proxygen::proxygenhttpserver")
+  foreach (_tenzir_candidate IN
+           ITEMS "proxygen" "Proxygen::proxygen" "proxygenhttpserver"
+                 "Proxygen::proxygenhttpserver")
     if (TARGET ${_tenzir_candidate})
       set(_tenzir_proxygen_target "${_tenzir_candidate}")
       break()
     endif ()
   endforeach ()
   if (NOT _tenzir_proxygen_target)
     message(
-      FATAL_ERROR
-        "Could not determine the Proxygen CMake target name; extend"
-        " the candidate list in CMakeLists.txt.")
+      FATAL_ERROR "Could not determine the Proxygen CMake target name; extend"
+                  " the candidate list in CMakeLists.txt.")
   endif ()
   message(STATUS "Using Proxygen target: ${_tenzir_proxygen_target}")
   set(_tenzir_bundled_proxygen "${_tenzir_proxygen_target}")
-  dependency_summary("proxygen"
-                     "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/proxygen"
-                     "Dependencies")
+  dependency_summary(
+    "proxygen" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/proxygen"
+    "Dependencies")
 endif ()
 
 if (TENZIR_ENABLE_RELOCATABLE_INSTALLATIONS

@@ -1,16 +1,12 @@
-ARG BUILD_JOBS=2
-
 FROM public.ecr.aws/docker/library/debian:trixie-slim AS runtime-base
 
 FROM gcc:15-trixie AS build-base
-ARG BUILD_JOBS
 
 ENV CC="gcc" \
     CXX="g++" \
     CMAKE_C_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache \
     CCACHE_DIR=/ccache \
     CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache \
-    BUILD_JOBS="${BUILD_JOBS}" \
     CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr/local
 
 RUN rm -f /etc/apt/apt.conf.d/docker-clean

@@ -110,7 +110,10 @@ endif ()
 # -- aws sdk (for direct S3 object deletion) -----------------------------------
 
 if (ARROW_S3)
-  find_package(AWSSDK COMPONENTS s3 REQUIRED CONFIG)
+  find_package(
+    AWSSDK
+    COMPONENTS s3
+    REQUIRED CONFIG)
   string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
          "\nfind_package(AWSSDK COMPONENTS s3 REQUIRED CONFIG)")
   dependency_summary("AWS SDK S3" ${AWSSDK_CORE_HEADER_FILE} "Dependencies")
@@ -128,7 +131,15 @@ endif ()
 
 # -- boost ---------------------------------------------------------------------
 
-find_package(Boost REQUIRED COMPONENTS headers filesystem url context program_options regex thread)
+find_package(
+  Boost REQUIRED
+  COMPONENTS headers
+             filesystem
+             url
+             context
+             program_options
+             regex
+             thread)
 
 # -- re2 -----------------------------------------------------------------------
 
@@ -153,7 +164,8 @@ provide_find_module(c-ares)
 # Use MODULE mode to avoid broken CMake config in static Nix builds
 
 find_package(EXPAT REQUIRED MODULE)
-string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(EXPAT REQUIRED MODULE)")
+string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
+       "\nfind_package(EXPAT REQUIRED MODULE)")
 dependency_summary("expat" EXPAT::EXPAT "Dependencies")
 
 # -- jemalloc ------------------------------------------------------------------
@@ -475,12 +487,20 @@ if (ARROW_AZURE)
 endif ()
 
 # Link against Boost.
-target_link_libraries(libtenzir PUBLIC Boost::headers Boost::filesystem
-                                       Boost::url Boost::context
-                                       Boost::program_options Boost::regex
-                                       Boost::thread)
-string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
-       "\nfind_package(Boost REQUIRED COMPONENTS headers filesystem url context program_options regex thread)")
+target_link_libraries(
+  libtenzir
+  PUBLIC Boost::headers
+         Boost::filesystem
+         Boost::url
+         Boost::context
+         Boost::program_options
+         Boost::regex
+         Boost::thread)
+string(
+  APPEND
+  TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
+  "\nfind_package(Boost REQUIRED COMPONENTS headers filesystem url context program_options regex thread)"
+)
 dependency_summary("Boost" Boost::headers "Dependencies")
 
 # Link against re2.
@@ -496,31 +516,35 @@ if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
   get_target_property(_tenzir_folly_include_dirs Folly::folly
                       INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES)
   if (_tenzir_folly_include_dirs)
-    target_include_directories(libtenzir BEFORE PRIVATE ${_tenzir_folly_include_dirs})
+    target_include_directories(libtenzir BEFORE
+                               PRIVATE ${_tenzir_folly_include_dirs})
   endif ()
 endif ()
 if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
   string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(folly REQUIRED)")
 endif ()
 if (TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN)
   if (DEFINED _tenzir_bundled_proxygen AND TARGET ${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen})
-    get_target_property(_tenzir_proxygen_include_dirs
-                        ${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}
-                        INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES)
+    get_target_property(
+      _tenzir_proxygen_include_dirs ${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}
+      INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES)
     if (_tenzir_proxygen_include_dirs)
-      target_include_directories(libtenzir PRIVATE ${_tenzir_proxygen_include_dirs})
+      target_include_directories(libtenzir
+                                 PRIVATE ${_tenzir_proxygen_include_dirs})
     endif ()
     target_link_libraries(
       libtenzir
       PRIVATE
-        $<$<BOOL:${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}>:$<TARGET_FILE:${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}>>)
+        $<$<BOOL:${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}>:$<TARGET_FILE:${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}>>
+    )
     if (DEFINED _tenzir_bundled_proxygen)
       message(VERBOSE "Linking Proxygen target: ${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}")
     endif ()
   else ()
     message(
       WARNING
-      "TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN is set but no known Proxygen target was detected.")
+        "TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN is set but no known Proxygen target was detected."
+    )
   endif ()
 endif ()
 # gflags is a transitive dependency of glog (used by folly). We must re-export

@@ -2,8 +2,6 @@
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
-BUILD_JOBS="${BUILD_JOBS:-$(nproc --all 2>/dev/null || echo 2)}"
-
 : "${ARROW_TAG=apache-arrow-23.0.0}"
 : "${ARROW_VERSION=$(printf '%s' "$ARROW_TAG" | sed 's@[^0-9]*\(.*\)@\1@')}"
 
@@ -70,7 +68,7 @@ cmake -B build -S . \
   -DARROW_WITH_ZSTD=ON \
   "${EXTRA_CMAKE_ARGS[@]}"
 
-cmake --build build --parallel "${BUILD_JOBS}"
+cmake --build build --parallel "$(nproc --all)"
 
 checkinstall \
   --fstrans=no \

@@ -8,8 +8,6 @@ export CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
-BUILD_JOBS="${BUILD_JOBS:-$(nproc --all 2>/dev/null || echo 2)}"
-
 apt-get update
 apt-get -y --no-install-recommends install \
   build-essential \
@@ -40,7 +38,7 @@ cmake -B build \
   -DCUSTOM_MEMORY_MANAGEMENT=OFF \
   "${EXTRA_CMAKE_ARGS[@]}"
 
-cmake --build build --parallel "${BUILD_JOBS}"
+cmake --build build --parallel "$(nproc --all)"
 
 checkinstall \
   --fstrans=no \

@@ -8,8 +8,6 @@ export CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
-BUILD_JOBS="${BUILD_JOBS:-$(nproc --all 2>/dev/null || echo 2)}"
-
 apt-get update
 apt-get -y --no-install-recommends install \
   build-essential \
@@ -53,7 +51,7 @@ cmake -B build -G Ninja \
   -DWARNINGS_AS_ERRORS=OFF \
   "${EXTRA_CMAKE_ARGS[@]}"
 
-cmake --build build --parallel "${BUILD_JOBS}"
+cmake --build build --parallel "$(nproc --all)"
 
 checkinstall \
   --fstrans=no \

@@ -4,8 +4,6 @@
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
-BUILD_JOBS="${BUILD_JOBS:-$(nproc --all 2>/dev/null || echo 2)}"
-
 apt-get -qq update
 apt-get install --no-install-recommends -y \
   bison \
@@ -38,7 +36,7 @@ cmake -B build \
   -DFLB_PREFER_SYSTEM_LIB_KAFKA=ON \
   "${EXTRA_CMAKE_ARGS[@]}"
 
-cmake --build build --parallel "${BUILD_JOBS}"
+cmake --build build --parallel "$(nproc --all)"
 
 cd build
 cpack -G DEB -D CPACK_STRIP_FILES=ON

@@ -2,8 +2,6 @@
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
-BUILD_JOBS="${BUILD_JOBS:-$(nproc --all 2>/dev/null || echo 2)}"
-
 : "${GOOGLE_CLOUD_CPP_TAG=v2.36.0}"
 : "${GOOGLE_CLOUD_CPP_VERSION=$(printf '%s' "$GOOGLE_CLOUD_CPP_TAG" | sed 's@[^0-9]*\(.*\)@\1@')}"
 
@@ -48,7 +46,7 @@ cmake -B build -S . \
   -DCRC32C_BUILD_BENCHMARKS=OFF \
   -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=20
 
-cmake --build build --parallel "${BUILD_JOBS}"
+cmake --build build --parallel "$(nproc --all)"
 
 checkinstall \
   --fstrans=no \
@@ -83,7 +81,7 @@ cmake -B build -S . \
   -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON \
   -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=20
 
-cmake --build build --parallel "${BUILD_JOBS}"
+cmake --build build --parallel "$(nproc --all)"
 
 checkinstall \
   --fstrans=no \

@@ -5,8 +5,6 @@
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
-BUILD_JOBS="${BUILD_JOBS:-$(nproc --all 2>/dev/null || echo 2)}"
-
 apt-get -qq update
 apt-get install --no-install-recommends -y \
   g++-14 \
@@ -37,7 +35,7 @@ export CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX
   --disable-cxx \
   --disable-libdl
 
-make -j "${BUILD_JOBS}"
+make -j "$(nproc || true)"
 
 checkinstall \
   --fstrans=no \

@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ cmake -B build -G Ninja \
   -DWITH_ZSTD=ON \
   -DWITH_LZ4_EXT=ON
 
-cmake --build build --parallel "${BUILD_JOBS:-2}"
+cmake --build build --parallel
 
 checkinstall \
   --fstrans=no \
